How to Use GHL Webinar App

A 5 steps guide covering the workflow on highlevelwebinar.com.

5 steps • Generated 2/18/2026

Table of Contents

1
Welcome to high-level webinar.
2
New webinar setup.
3
First, click on this box and add a webinar name.
4

5
Oops, this is another page and it's not related to high level webinar.
1
Welcome to high-level webinar.

This is High-Level Webinar Dashboard, we call it Laboratory.

https://highlevelwebinar.com/laboratory
2
New webinar setup.

I clicked at the new webinar button and I landed on this page.

https://highlevelwebinar.com/webinar/new
3
First, click on this box and add a webinar name.

Your audience will not see this name. This is only for you to recognize the webinar.

https://highlevelwebinar.com/webinar/new
4
Now add header title.

This part is important because your webinar attendees will see this title.

https://highlevelwebinar.com/webinar/new
5
Oops, this is another page and it's not related to high level webinar.

In case you are wondering, this is the download page of Stepwise Chrome extension.

https://app.heychatmate.com/stepwise/downloads/
